pkgmetadata.longdescription: The demjson module, and the included jsonlint script, provide methodsfor encoding and decoding JSON formatted data, as well as checking JSONdata for errors andor portability issues. The jsonlint commandscriptcan be used from the command line without needing any programming.Although the standard Python library now includes basic JSON support(which it did not when demjson was first written), this moduleprovides a much more comprehensive implementation with many featuresnot found elsewhere. It is especially useful for error checking orfor parsing JavaScript data which may not strictly be valid JSON data.
